reviews.comment:
El lugar es agradable, limpio, bien iluminado por la noche. La desventaja es que siempre hay mucha gente. Y las filas son interminables

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice, clean, and well-lit at night. The downside is that it's always very crowded, and the lines are endless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnZ3NPSy1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Muy limpio y ameno. Lindo para descansar un poco del viaje..

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. Very clean and pleasant. Nice place to rest a bit from the trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURReGZ5Rl9RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy atentos los playeros preparados y listos para ayudarte te lavan parabrisa luneta y obticas. Playa limpia y baños tambien.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are very attentive and ready to help; they wash windshields, rear windows, and headlights. The beach and restrooms are clean too.
